english: to be afraid / to be scared / to fear
notes: Fixed phrase using the noun 'Angst' (die Angst). Often followed by 'vor + Dativ' (afraid of something) or 'dass' (afraid that). 'Angst haben vor' is the most common construction.
cloze_text:
Viele Kinder {{c1::haben}} {{c2::Angst}} vor der Dunkelheit.
Mein Bruder {{c3::hat}} {{c4::Angst}}, allein nach Hause zu gehen.

cloze_sentences.english: Many children are afraid of the dark.
